Off Calendar May-24-2005 Continued To Jul-15-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclaire.
Lewis Phon, Esq. for Plaintiff: Michael Nelson, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Carolyn Nelson Davis as follows:
Judgment restoring name of plaintiff to title to the real property commonly known as 70 Gould St., San Francisco. The name and interests of Carolyn Nelson Davis shall be removed and vacated from the title.
Punitive damages in the amount of $80,000.00
Waived fees and costs.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Continued To Jun-02-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Lewis Phon, Esq. for Plaintiff: Michael Nelson, also present, was sworn and examined.
EXH. 1- Quick Claim Deed.------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2- Grant Deed-------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 3- Complaint-Quiet Title case # -----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continued this matter to June 2, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for counsel to prepare brief and file the declaration by Mr. Nelson.
